flair_enforcement_enabled.label: Enable Flair Enforcement
flair_enforcement_enabled.helpText: Enabling this option will allow Artemis to remind users about missing post flair and remove unflaired posts.

flair_enforce_remove_posts.label: Remove Unflaired Posts
flair_enforce_remove_posts.helpText: Only applies when flair enforcement is enabled. Remove posts that remain unflaired; when disabled, Artemis sends flair reminder messages without removing posts.

flair_enforce_moderators.label: Enforce Flair on Moderator Posts
flair_enforce_moderators.helpText: Apply flair enforcement settings to posts made by subreddit moderators. By default, Artemis will not enforce flair for moderators.

flair_enforce_approve_posts.label: Approve Flaired Posts
flair_enforce_approve_posts.helpText: Approve posts that Artemis has previously removed once they receive a post flair. Only applies when unflaired post removal is enabled.

flair_enforce_custom_message.label: Custom Flair Reminder Message
flair_enforce_custom_message.helpText: Provide a custom message to include in the bot's flair reminder messages. Messages over 500 characters will be truncated. (optional)

custom_goodbye.label: Custom Goodbye
custom_goodbye.helpText: A short sign-off message used in flair reminder messages. Values over 20 characters are truncated. (optional)

flair_enforce_whitelist.label: Flair Enforcement Username Whitelist
flair_enforce_whitelist.helpText: Exclude these usernames from being subject to flair enforcement. Separate usernames with commas or new lines. Do not include u/. (optional)

flair_tag_nsfw.label: NSFW Flair Template IDs
flair_tag_nsfw.helpText: Post flair template IDs listed here will be automatically tagged as 'NSFW'. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_tag_spoiler.label: Spoiler Flair Template IDs
flair_tag_spoiler.helpText: Post flair template IDs listed here will be automatically tagged as 'spoiler'. Separate IDs with commas or new lines. (optional)

flair_schedule_notes.label: Flair Schedule Notes
flair_schedule_notes.helpText: Completely optional, but Artemis allows you to set flairs (up to five) to only be allowed on certain days.
flair_schedule_notes.placeholder: For example, a 'Memes' flair can be set to only be allowed on Mondays, or a 'Self-Promotion' flair on Sundays.

flair_schedule_rule_1_ids.label: Flair Schedule 1: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_1_ids.helpText: Post flair template IDs for this schedule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_1_days.label: Flair Schedule 1: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_1_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_2_ids.label: Flair Schedule 2: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_2_ids.helpText: Post flair template IDs for this schedule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_2_days.label: Flair Schedule 2: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_2_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_3_ids.label: Flair Schedule 3: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_3_ids.helpText: Post flair template IDs for this schedule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_3_days.label: Flair Schedule 3: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_3_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_4_ids.label: Flair Schedule 4: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_4_ids.helpText: Post flair template IDs for this schedule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_4_days.label: Flair Schedule 4: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_4_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_5_ids.label: Flair Schedule 5: Template IDs
flair_schedule_rule_5_ids.helpText: Post flair template IDs for this schedule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_5_days.label: Flair Schedule 5: Allowed Days
flair_schedule_rule_5_days.helpText: Days when these flair templates are allowed.
